description.en: Search for files matching a name pattern in a directory.
description.de: Nach Dateien suchen, die einem Namensmuster in einem Verzeichnis entsprechen.
description.es: Search for files matching a name pattern in a directory.
description.fr: Search for files matching a name pattern in a directory.
description.ro: Search for files matching a name pattern in a directory.
description.it: Search for files matching a name pattern in a directory.

description.en: The filename pattern to search for (e.g. *.pdf, report*)
description.es: The filename pattern to search for (e.g. *.pdf, report*)
description.fr: The filename pattern to search for (e.g. *.pdf, report*)
description.ro: The filename pattern to search for (e.g. *.pdf, report*)
description.it: The filename pattern to search for (e.g. *.pdf, report*)

inputs.bot: The directory to search in. Default to the user's home directory if not specified.
